content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post-098)

## TOP PRIORITY — co-dispatch the downstream TensorObjInverse dual cone (FLANK now green)
`PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` (L1′) is **frozen-green, axiom-clean, EXIT 0**; `dag-query gaps` = 0.
The downstream cone in `TensorObjInverse.lean` RIDES L1′ and was deferred only by the PARALLEL-LANE
BUILD RACE (upstream was churning). Upstream is now frozen ⇒ co-dispatch is SAFE. Open targets
(grep-confirmed, all genuine open math sorried even in v4.30):
- `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble` (L1583) — FLANK assembly, consumes `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural`.
- `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` (L2387) — FLANK, rides L1′.
- `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2370).
- terminal `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L2444) — the cone apex; consumer seed-3 (`RelPicFunctor`) rides it.
HARD GATE: `TensorObjInverse.lean` maps to `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` (`% archon:covers`), cleared
092/093/094; confirm via the mandatory blueprint-reviewer dispatch before the prover. Build the leaf-import
chain serialized if you touch any upstream decl; otherwise the cone is a single in-file lane.

## BLUEPRINT (do first, cheap) — generalise the linchpin statement
`lem:pushforward_beta_unit_eps_app_one` states only the `y=1` case; the Lean decl
`pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne` proves arbitrary `y`, and the L1′ consumer (L285-286) instantiates at a
**non-1** carrier — so the generality is REQUIRED, not incidental. A `% NOTE:` is already in the chapter.
Dispatch a blueprint-writer to generalise the display to arbitrary `y` (keep `y=1` as motivating instance).
[lvb-pdup-iter098, major / non-must-fix]

## COVERAGE DEBT — 2 new helpers need blueprint entries
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 156 (was 154; +2 this iter). The 2 new `lean_aux` nodes:
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.restrictScalars_laxMonoidal_ε_app` — abstract `{R S : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ CommRingCat}`
  ε-value of `restrictScalars` (`ε.app W r = (α.app W).hom r`). Depends on `ModuleCat.restrictScalars_η`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app` — sectionwise carrier value of
  `q.inv = ε(pushforward β)` (`(q.inv.app V).hom w = (f.appIso V).inv.hom w`). Depends on `comp_ε`,
  `CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id`, `restrictScalars_laxMonoidal_ε_app`. (Stronger promotion candidate —
  the FLANK consumes it directly.)
Author blueprint entries for both. Full 156-node list still deferred to the post-recovery coverage cleanup.

## .lean HYGIENE (prover/refactor, non-blocking)
- **Stale phantom comment refs** in `PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` L221/252/261/268: cite
  `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality (DualInverse.lean:317)` — no such declaration exists (DualInverse.lean:317
  is inside `dualUnitRingSwapHom`'s body). Have the file owner correct/remove. [lean-auditor iter098 minor]
- `subsingleton` → `rfl` simplifiable at L256/301 (lake "Try this: [apply] rfl"). Cosmetic.
- ~12 `linter.style.longLine` warnings; verbatim goal terms — leave or wrap if touched.

## CLEANUP (deferred, unchanged)
- Delete dead `private exists_tensorObj_inverse` dup in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (~L716/738) — cleanup phase.
- progress-critic is HIGH-VALUE next iter: the dual cone is a fresh prover lane and the FLANK's 085–087
  churn history warrants a convergence read once trajectory data exists.

## Do NOT re-assign
- `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural`, `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne` — DONE, axiom-clean. Do not touch.
